reviews.author: interstellar ic
reviews.review_body: All the reviews here that are posted 9 months ago are from the schools teachers, regardless no appreciation for students, at all, and there are too many exams, class test, periodical, half yearly all in a span of 1.5 months, students stressed and pressurised. All the 5 star reviews are from schools teachers

reviews.school_name: G.D. Goenka Public School - GAUTAM BUDDHA NAGAR
reviews.author: just nobody
reviews.review_body: Horrible school, do not get admission in this school, all the good reviews are 80% fake. Teachers don’t listen to student(s) problems at all.. Low quality principle and some other teachers.

reviews.school_name: G.D. Goenka Public School - GAUTAM BUDDHA NAGAR
reviews.author: Naveen Jain
reviews.review_body: Pathetic, no appreciation for good students who achieve results in academics, principal has no qualities, zero infrastructure.. DON'T SEND HERE .. SCHOOL  PENALTIZED BY GOVT FOR NOT REFUNDING FEE OF COVID

reviews.school_name: G.D. Goenka Public School - GAUTAM BUDDHA NAGAR
reviews.author: Kuldeep Singh
reviews.review_body:
Kamla gate opposite swarn nagari gate .Brand name in market ,but really far off .and situated really isolated, navigation will lead you to the village shortcut, train tracks and so on
We got miss in day hour
The best part is people dnt know the location of school , basically somewhere industrial area .
Really not safe to go late evening.
So possibly its a big school but very very far off
